scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('wrangler.json')){const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('wrangler.json')); delete c.main; delete c.assets; fs.writeFileSync('wrangler.json', JSON.stringify(c, null, 2));}"
scripts.build: astro build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('wrangler.json')); c.main=fs.existsSync('./dist/_worker.js/index.js')?'./dist/_worker.js/index.js':'./dist/server/entry.mjs'; c.assets={binding:'ASSETS',directory:'./dist'}; fs.writeFileSync('wrangler.json', JSON.stringify(c, null, 2));"
